Marketing built for local professional and service businesses.

Copper Beacon's strongest fit is with businesses that depend on local customers finding them online. Here's who we work with.

Industries we serve

Dentists & dental practices

Help patients find your practice before they find your competitor. Local SEO, Google Business Profile, and review management for dental offices.

Learn more at DentistLift.com →

Orthodontists

Families search for orthodontists weeks before they call. Make sure your practice is the first one they find.

Learn more at OrthodontistGrowth.com →

Chiropractors

High search volume, high competition. We help chiropractic practices rank where patients are looking and build the review count to convert them.

Learn more at ChiropractorGrowth.com →

Plumbers

Plumbing is one of the highest-intent local searches there is. We make sure your business shows up when someone needs a plumber right now.

Learn more at PlumberBoost.com →

Electricians

Electrical work is high-ticket and reputation-driven. Ranking well and having strong reviews wins jobs before anyone picks up the phone.

Learn more at ElectricianBoost.com →

Roofers

Roofing is seasonal and competitive. The businesses that dominate local search in their market win a disproportionate share of jobs.

Learn more at GetMoreRoofing.com →

Pest control

Urgent searches, high conversion rate. Pest control companies that rank in the Map Pack see consistent year-round lead flow.

Learn more at PestControlBoost.com →

Window washers

A clean local search presence is the difference between a full schedule and a slow one. We help residential and commercial window washing businesses get found.

Learn more at WindowWasherLaunch.com →

Veterinarians

Pet owners search online before choosing a vet. Strong reviews, complete profiles, and local SEO bring new patients through the door.

Learn more at VeterinarianBoost.com →

Realtors

Real estate is hyper-local. We help individual agents and small brokerages build the digital presence that earns trust before the first showing.

Learn more at RealtorLaunch.com →

Insurance agents

Independent agents compete against captive agencies and big brands. Local SEO and a strong Google presence are the great equalizer.

Learn more at InsuranceAgentGrowth.com →

Not listed? Let's talk.

We work with most local professional and service businesses. If you didn't see your industry above, we probably still know how to help.

Get in touch

We work with businesses of every size — but we do our best work for high-ticket local services.

Copper Beacon works with small local businesses, established practices, and multi-location operations. But our strongest results come from businesses where a single new customer is worth real money — dentists, orthodontists, lawyers, specialty contractors, and other professional service businesses where one new client can mean thousands in revenue. That's where the math of local SEO really pays off.

Ready to let the customers find you?

Fifteen minutes. No pitch. Just a real conversation about whether we can help.

Book a free 15-minute call
Copper Beacon

You run the business. We bring the customers.

hello@copperbeacon.com
